headline: JAKKS Pacific and Stanley Black & Decker Extend Iconic BLACK+DECKER™ Toy Licensing Partnership Through 2028
summary: Trusted brand collaboration continues to inspire the next generation of young builders, chefs and homemakers SANTA MONICA, Calif., May 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) a leading designer, manufacturer and marketer of toys and consumer products, has renewed and extended its long-standing licensing agreement with Stanley Black & Decker for the BLACK+DECKER™ toy line. The agreement extends the partnership through December 2028, covering an expansive portfolio of role-
